docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT HENDRICKS, BRUCE CHARLES AKA BRUCE C. HENDRICKS AKA BRUCE HENDRICKS ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENDRICKS, BRUCE CHARLES AKA BRUCE C. HENDRICKS AKA BRUCE HENDRICKS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 795 GEARY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA #506, STAYED UNTIL APR-17-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFS MAY STAY IN UNIT UNTIL MIDNIGHT APR 14, 1996. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT, DAMAGES, ATNY FEES & COSTS. DEFT WAVIES REIMBURSEMENT OF CLOSING DEPOSIT.

JUDGE D BALLATI; RPTR S LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PRESENT ARE DEFT HENDRICKS, IN PRO PER, AND ATNY RONALD ARLAS FOR PLTF MERIDIAN MNGMENT. ALSO PRESENT IS MERIDIAN AGENT SANDY IVANS. A SETTLEMENT IS REACHED WITH STIP FOR JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES. TERMS ARE ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE THE STIPULATED JUDGMENT AND DELIVER TO DEFT FOR REVIEW. THE COURT WILL NOT SIGN JUDGMENT UNTIL 3PM 9-APR-96 FOR THAT PURPOSE. CASE TAKEN OFF TRIAL CAL OF 16-APR-96.
